signal: Cold-rolled steel sheet (GOES proxy)
mechanism: Grain-oriented electrical steel — the transformer CORE material — is a specialised cold-rolled silicon-steel sheet. FRED has no GOES-specific series, so cold-rolled steel sheet & strip is the closest public PPI to the core input. Mechanistically the strongest single candidate.

signal: Producer Price Index by Commodity: Metals an
mechanism: Upstream input material/energy cost (metals, energy, materials) that feeds finished transformer cost.

signal: Producer Price Index by Commodity: Metals an
mechanism: Upstream input material/energy cost (metals, energy, materials) that feeds finished transformer cost.

signal: Metals and Metal Products
mechanism: Producer price for a metals/metal-products group — a material-input signal; included to map the force structure and triangulate (expected co-mover).

signal: Rubber and Plastic Products: Plastic Constru
mechanism: Producer price for a plastics/rubber-products group — insulation/enclosure input (expected co-mover).

signal: Nonferrous wire & cable PPI
mechanism: The literal wound-conductor product (copper/aluminum wire & cable) that goes into windings — one step downstream of raw metal, one step upstream of the finished transformer.

signal: Steel mill products PPI
mechanism: Broad finished steel (sheet, plate, structural) fabricated into transformer tanks, cores and mountings — one step downstream of raw iron & steel.

signal: Metals and Metal Products: Nonferrous Mill S
mechanism: Producer price for a metals/metal-products group — a material-input signal; included to map the force structure and triangulate (expected co-mover).

signal: Producer Price Index by Commodity: Metals an
mechanism: Upstream input material/energy cost (metals, energy, materials) that feeds finished transformer cost.

signal: Global price of Metal index
mechanism: Global commodity benchmark / trade-weighted dollar; traded-input triangulation and FX pass-through.

signal: Global tin price
mechanism: Tin is the solder that joins electrical connections in transformers, switchgear and assemblies; its price tracks connection/joint material cost.

signal: Copper PPI
mechanism: Copper is the primary conductor for transformer windings; its input price feeds directly into finished transformer cost.

signal: Global copper price
mechanism: Independent global (LME-based) copper benchmark; triangulates the domestic copper PPI.

signal: Metals and Metal Products: Nonferrous Metals
mechanism: Producer price for a metals/metal-products group — a material-input signal; included to map the force structure and triangulate (expected co-mover).

signal: Global price of Industrial Materials index
mechanism: Global commodity benchmark / trade-weighted dollar; traded-input triangulation and FX pass-through.

signal: Iron & steel PPI
mechanism: Electrical (silicon) steel forms the transformer core; broad iron & steel prices proxy that core-metal cost.

signal: Metals and Metal Products: Secondary Nonferr
mechanism: Producer price for a metals/metal-products group — a material-input signal; included to map the force structure and triangulate (expected co-mover).

signal: Producer Price Index by Commodity: Metals an
mechanism: Upstream input material/energy cost (metals, energy, materials) that feeds finished transformer cost.

signal: Import Price Index (End Use): Finished Metal
mechanism: Imported input cost (metals, capital goods, industrial supplies); delivered import prices lead domestic transformer input PPI.

signal: Metals and Metal Products: Primary Nonferrou
mechanism: Producer price for a metals/metal-products group — a material-input signal; included to map the force structure and triangulate (expected co-mover).

signal: Aluminum mill shapes PPI
mechanism: Aluminum is the main alternative winding conductor and is used in housings and radiators.

signal: Import Price Index (End Use): Major Nonferro
mechanism: Imported input cost (metals, capital goods, industrial supplies); delivered import prices lead domestic transformer input PPI.

signal: Global aluminum price
mechanism: Independent global aluminum benchmark; triangulates the domestic aluminum PPI.

signal: Import Price Index (End Use): Iron and Steel
mechanism: Imported input cost (metals, capital goods, industrial supplies); delivered import prices lead domestic transformer input PPI.

signal: Import: Ind. Supplies & Materials (durable)
mechanism: Import price index; imported input costs tend to lead domestic PPI.

signal: Chemicals and Allied Products: Plastic Resin
mechanism: Producer price for a chemicals group (resins, coatings, treatment chemicals) — a non-metal input signal (expected co-mover).
